creator: FreeBSD@ShaneWare.Biz
text:
Created attachment 216061
maintainer update for graphics/opensubdiv

Update graphics/opensubdiv to v3.4.3
Some of the example and test code fails to build using clang 10 on 32bit archs, these have been commented out to prevent failed builds. See https://github.com/PixarAnimationStudios/OpenSubdiv/issues/1198
